message:
chore(artifacts): refresh test/E2E/golden-journey logs after split fix

After landing the eval_split overflow hardening (frankenjax-fuvh,
previous commit), re-run the full test/conformance/E2E suite so
the deterministic on-disk evidence ledger matches reality. The
committed artifact tree is the project's "tests passed at this
commit" snapshot — every passing test, conformance harness, and
golden-journey scenario writes a JSON record under artifacts/, and
those files are tracked so a fresh clone can prove green status
without re-running anything.

Files refreshed in this commit (all auto-generated, no manual
edits):

- artifacts/ci/runs/synthetic-forensics-test/manifest.json
    (synthetic-forensics CI manifest, run_id + start/finish
    timestamps + per-step timestamps for the four intentionally-
    failing gates that exercise the forensics pipeline)
- artifacts/e2e/*.e2e.json                          (44 files)
    (P2C end-to-end harness results: dispatch pipelines, IR
    determinism, transform-stack composition, vmap, jit constant
    folding, RNG determinism, mixed-dtype, adversarial fixtures,
    etc.; all `passed_cases` unchanged, only generated_at_unix_ms
    bumped)
- artifacts/e2e/golden_journeys/gj_*.golden.json    (8 files)
    (Eight golden-journey scenarios from gj_01 basic JIT through
    gj_08 ledger inspection; each carries a ts_utc_unix_ms that
    reflects the latest replay)
- artifacts/testing/logs/fj-ad/                     (1 file)
- artifacts/testing/logs/fj-conformance/            (4 files)
- artifacts/testing/logs/fj-core/                   (~30 files)
- artifacts/testing/logs/fj-dispatch/               (~30 files)
- artifacts/testing/logs/fj-interpreters/           (~25 files)
- artifacts/testing/logs/fj-trace/                  (~35 files)
    (Per-test JSON records with timestamp_unix_ms + duration_ms +
    setup_ms phase timing; result=pass on every record. The
    duration_ms numbers shift by a few ms either way as expected
    on a re-run; no result fields changed and no test transitioned
    pass↔fail.)

Pure timestamp/timing churn — no schema changes, no test results
changed, no test added or removed at this layer (the new
test_split_empty_huge_equal_section_returns_empty_tensor lives
only in fj-lax's in-crate unit suite, which doesn't write its own
per-test JSON to artifacts/testing/logs/).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
